# mxroute_reseller_package (Data Source)

Fetches a single reseller package by name. Requires reseller API access. For all packages, use `mxroute_reseller_packages`.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "mxroute_reseller_package" "example" {
  name = "starter"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) The package name to look up.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Data source identifier — the package name.
- `settings` (Attributes) The limits the package grants. A null count means unlimited. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--settings))

<a id="nestedatt--settings"></a>
### Nested Schema for `settings`

Read-Only:

- `domain_pointers` (Number) Maximum domain pointers; null when unlimited.
- `domains` (Number) Maximum domains; null when unlimited.
- `email_accounts` (Number) Maximum mailboxes; null when unlimited.
- `email_forwarders` (Number) Maximum forwarders; null when unlimited.
- `quota_gb` (Number) Total storage quota in gigabytes; null when unlimited.
- `quota_unlimited` (Boolean) Whether the storage quota is unlimited.
